title: docs: scrub tier and drip copy
author: voodoohop
pr_body_excerpt:
Splits the copy-only wording changes out of #11996.

- Updates docs, prompts, and site copy from tier/drip framing to Quests/Pollen wording.
- Updates site metadata and string constants only; no runtime, service, test, or workflow deletions are included.
- Leaves behavioral changes for the companion code split.

Validation:
- npx biome check --write on the touched supported files
- git diff --cached --check

Refs #11996.

gist.headline: From drips to Pollen
gist.blurb: We've updated our documentation and website copy to fully embrace our new Quests and Pollen system. Say goodbye to 'tiers' and 'drips', and hello to earning Pollen!
gist.summary: Updated documentation, prompts, and website copy to replace legacy 'tier' and 'drip' terminology with the new 'Quests' and 'Pollen' framing.
gist.impact: Users will see consistent Quests and Pollen terminology across the website, documentation, and AI agent prompts.
gist.visual_concept: Polly the bee mascot acting as a painter or editor, updating signs in a garden. The old concepts (tiers/drips) are being painted over with the new concepts (Quests/Pollen).
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of Polly the bee mascot wearing a tiny painter's beret, painting a wooden sign in a lush digital garden. The sign reads 'QUESTS' and 'POLLEN' in chunky pixel font, covering up old faded text. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and pastel peach gradient background. Warm lighting, lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic like Stardew Valley, emotionally warm and inviting.
